plugins.name: GitHub Analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze GitHub repository issues and pull requests. Summarize issues, list open PRs, find stale issues, analyze PR changes, and perform code reviews.
plugins.author: ZhongsJie

plugins.name: Triton Kernel Analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze and optimize Triton GPU kernel performance. Profile kernel execution, identify bottlenecks, and suggest optimizations.
plugins.author: ZhongsJie

plugins.name: vLLM Performance Optimization
plugins.description: Analyze and optimize vLLM inference performance. Identify optimization opportunities including tensor operations, caching, device memory transfers, batching, kernel tuning, and conditional work skipping. Based on real-world optimizations from vLLM contributors.
plugins.author: ZhongsJie
